response.justification: Bogdan possesses extensive software development experience, including highly relevant work in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms. However, this is a mid-to-senior level management position requiring at least two years of dedicated people management. His resume reflects a highly technical Individual Contributor (Staff Engineer) trajectory with no explicit mention of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or leading organizational change, making him a poor fit for a full-time people-leadership role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience across various stacks, including mobile platforms (iOS/Apple TV).
Strong background in engineering productivity, having built test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD pipelines, and IDE components.
Demonstrated technical leadership as a Staff Engineer and Founder, including organizing coding dojos and technical workshops.
concerns: Complete lack of explicit people management experience, which is a minimum requirement for this Level II Manager role.
No evidence of establishing performance expectations, conducting 1:1s, or driving professional development for engineers.
Lacks demonstrated experience in leading organizational change or managing cross-team alignment at a managerial level.
